template: You are a product feedback analyst. Summarize the following customer review in one sentence, highlighting sentiment for each mentioned feature. Review: '{{reviewText}}'
Translate the following customer-facing support message to formal {{targetLanguage}}, maintaining a professional and helpful tone. Text: '{{text}}'
You are a copywriter for a premium {{industry}} brand. Write a 2-sentence product description for {{productName}} that emphasizes {{emphasis}}. Tone: {{tone}}.
Extract all action items from the meeting notes below. Return a JSON array where each item has: owner, task, and deadline. Meeting notes: '{{meetingNotes}}'
You are a support triage agent. Classify the following ticket as High, Medium, or Low priority. Return JSON with fields: priority, reason. Ticket: '{{ticketText}}'
Generate {{count}} email subject line options for {{emailTopic}} targeting {{audience}}. Each should be clear, professional, and under 60 characters. Indicate which is recommended.
Rewrite the following sentence to be concise and direct. Remove redundancy without losing meaning. Target: under {{wordLimit}} words. Sentence: '{{sentence}}'
Analyze the sentiment of the following tweet. Return JSON with: sentiment (Positive/Neutral/Negative), confidence (0–100), and a one-sentence rationale. Tweet: '{{tweetText}}'
Write a one-paragraph onboarding welcome message for a new user of {{productName}}, a {{productDescription}}. Tone: {{tone}}. Mention: {{mentions}}. Max {{maxWords}} words.
Generate {{count}} FAQs for {{productType}} targeting {{audience}}. For each FAQ, provide the question and a concise 1–2 sentence answer. Focus on {{focusAreas}}.
Summarize the following article in exactly {{count}} bullet points for {{audience}}. Each bullet must be one sentence and highlight {{emphasis}}. Article: '{{articleText}}'

Write a {{dialect}} query to retrieve all users who signed up in the last {{days}} days. Return only {{fields}}. Exclude soft-deleted records where deleted_at is not null. Add a comment explaining the query.
Generate {{count}} name ideas for {{appDescription}}. Each name should be short (1–2 words), memorable, and available as a .com domain. Include a one-line rationale for each.
Explain what {{concept}} is to {{audience}} in {{sentenceLimit}} sentences or fewer. Use a real-world analogy. Avoid all technical jargon.
Write a professional and empathetic {{emailType}} email. {{context}}. Keep it under {{wordLimit}} words. Do not use '{{avoidPhrase}}'.
List {{count}} best practices for {{topic}} targeting {{audience}}. For each practice, include a one-line explanation and a short code example demonstrating good vs. bad usage.

Write {{count}} push notification options for {{campaign}}. Each must be under {{charLimit}} characters, create urgency without being spammy, and include a clear CTA. Label which performs best for {{targetUser}}.
Explain the difference between {{conceptA}} and {{conceptB}} for {{audience}}. Use one concrete example for each. Keep the total response under {{wordLimit}} words.
Write a UX microcopy tooltip for a '{{buttonLabel}}' button in {{appContext}}. It should explain what {{action}} does, distinguish it from {{relatedAction}}, and stay under {{wordLimit}} words.
Generate a {{language}} regex pattern that validates {{validationTarget}} including formats: {{formats}}. Include a brief explanation of each part of the pattern and a test snippet.

Write a UX error message for {{errorContext}} in {{appContext}}. The message should: identify what went wrong, tell the user what to do next, and offer a fallback action. Keep it under {{wordLimit}} words. Avoid technical jargon.
Summarize the top {{count}} business benefits of {{topic}} for {{audience}} in {{count}} bullet points. Each bullet should be one sentence and focus on {{emphasis}}.
Write an SEO-optimized meta description for a {{product}} landing page targeting {{audience}}. Include a primary keyword, a differentiator, and a CTA. Stay under {{charLimit}} characters.

Write a changelog entry for {{feature}} in a SaaS product. Follow this format: feature name, one-sentence description of what it does, and one sentence on how to enable it. Keep it under {{wordLimit}} words. Tone: {{tone}}.
